decision.rationale: The plate at turnarounds/head-3quarter.png fails multiple cited identity rules. Most critically, although the file is designated as the 3-quarter view, it is drawn as a profile view where only one eye reads, violating the visibility requirements of IR.sean.face.eye-spacing-one-eye-width. Furthermore, the single visible eyebrow is highly arched instead of meeting the strong horizontal requirement in IR.sean.face.brow-line-strong-horizontal. The coloring violates IR.sean.palette.full-color-pencil-test-vocabulary by using smooth gradient/airbrush shadows and highlights on the skin and hair instead of flat fills. Lastly, the plate lacks the visible construction lines (horizontal eye-line, vertical face-midline) required by IR.sean.style.construction-lines-visible-beneath-final, reading as a fully cleaned-up drawing. The plate honors IR.sean.face.jaw-line-angular-not-rounded (angular jaw and squared chin) and IR.sean.style.line-weight-hb-to-2b-warm-graphite (varying line weights in warm graphite), while IR.sean.hair.center-cowlick is borderline as the crown cowlick is faint.
